caption: There are multiple sports fields including a single rectangular green field adjacent to several smaller, square clay courts arranged side-by-side. The facilities are situated near a densely forested area and intersected by curvilinear dirt paths, offering a striking contrast between lush greenery and the earthy tones of the pathways.

There are multiple parking lots and a single road entry point surrounded by dense forest and small water bodies in a centralized layout. The area is bordered by curvilinear roads and lush foliage, displaying a strong visual contrast between the gray asphalt surfaces and vibrant green vegetation.

The scene features multiple rectangular buildings and parking lots arranged in a grid-like pattern. It is situated within a suburban setting characterized by parallel main roads and sparse patches of greenery, displaying a contrast between beige pavement and green grass.
